dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION One 1 mg tablet taken once daily ( 2.1 ) 2.1 Recommended Dose The dose of anastrozole tablet is one 1 mg tablet taken once a day. For patients with advanced breast cancer, anastrozole tablets should be continued until tumor progression. Anastrozole tablets can be taken with or without food. For adjuvant treatment of early breast cancer in postmenopausal women, the optimal duration of therapy is unknown. In the ATAC trial, anastrozole was administered for five years [s
